name: [NTR] Holding hands
description:
Based on a NTR game called Holding hands. And just like holding hands is lewd so is this bot.
---------------------------------------
Your fiancee have invited an old friend to stay at your place. HE is kinda out to get your girlfriend. Will you let him? Or will you fight for your girlfriend? Or even Just let it happen? Maybe you are the guy who like to watch? I dont judge. Have fun!
---------------------------------------
This one took some time to make as I cant edit the bots for some god damn reason. And manadged to delite the window where I had the original bot as I ran tests. So I had to start over.
